revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Technical reasons]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: See [[Module:Technical reasons]] for further details, the template and the module should have the same protection level ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

#redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects T]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects T]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects T]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects T]]</noinclude>
#redirect[[:en:Template:Technical reasons]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects T]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects T
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Technical reasons]] <noinclude></noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#invoke:Technical reasons|technicalReasons}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Technical reasons|technicalReasons}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Technical reasons|technicalReasons}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Technical reasons|technicalReasons}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Technical reasons|technicalReasons}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Technical reasons|technicalReasons}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#invoke:Technical reasons|technicalReasons}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Technical reasons]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: See [[Module:Technical reasons]] for further details, the template and the module should have the same protection level ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Technical reasons|technicalReasons}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Technical reasons|technicalReasons}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
